context:
Before pushing:
- Check remote URL (git remote -v)
- If GitHub, exclude sensitive files (.env, tokens, credentials)
- Prefer git push -u for new branches
- Never force push to main/master without explicit permission

Destructive file operation:
- Confirm exact path with user
- Check directory contents before deleting
- Prefer moving to /tmp over permanent deletion when possible

Production change detected:
- Prototype the change in /tmp first
- Show diff to user before applying
- Confirm there is a rollback path
